evidence: Source analysis found the claimed bug in google/protobuf/text_format.cc: CheckParseInputSize() dereferences the default-null error_collector_ when input.size() > INT_MAX. A fresh PoC was built against builds/protobuf-asan-arm64/lib/libprotobuf.a using the provided compile flags plus pkg-config protobuf dependencies. However, the compiled PoC never reaches main(); the supplied ASan build aborts during protobuf descriptor static initialization with AddressSanitizer: SEGV in google::protobuf::DescriptorPool::Tables::Tables() -> internal::AddDescriptors(). Because the crash occurs before the oversize TextFormat parser path is executed, the finding is not confirmed against the real compiled library. See validation/asan_output.txt for the startup crash evidence.
